entry.title: New: CC 25-3 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCIL CHAIR LEE, transmitting an amendment to Bill 3 (2025), entitled "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO RATIFY ORDINANCE 5702 (2024), AMENDING THE LĀNAʻI COMMUNITY PLAN FOR 268.349 ACRES LOCATED IN LĀNAʻI CITY, LĀNAʻI, HAWAII, IDENTIFIED AS TAX MAP KEYS (2) 4-9-001:021, 024, 030; (2) 4-9-002:001 (POR.), 061 (PORS.); (2) 4-9-018:002 (PORS.), 003 (PORS.), 005; AND (2) 4-9-021:009 (LĀNAʻI PROJECT DISTRICT 2 (KŌʻELE))"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
